title: GPT-5.4 Now Available
description: Windsurf added support for OpenAI's GPT-5.4 model with limited-time promotional pricing. The model features multiple reasoning effort levels (No Reasoning at 1x credits, Low at 1x, Medium at 2x, High at 3x, Extra High at 8x) and is available in Arena Mode's Frontier and Hybrid Battle Groups.

community_feedback.quote: GPT-5.4 is almost perfect. The only bottleneck is obviously the front-end and styling, but it is perfect for agentic tasks. I just love it.
I feel gpt 5.4 must be way better to justify this pricing, especially after the promo pricing ends.
GPT-5.4 demonstrates deeper exploration and higher attention to detail compared to other models we've tested.

title: Version 1.9577.24 - Cascade & Jupyter Improvements
description: Windsurf released version 1.9577.24 with improvements to Cascade agent including fixes for dangling Diff Zones related to Jupyter Notebooks, improved Jupyter Notebook performance on WSL, enhanced Cascade UI rendering performance, and fixes for agent panel crashes. Also added SKILL.md file loading support and improved MCP context management.

title: Version 1.9577.27 - Apple M5 Fix
description: Windsurf released version 1.9577.27 with bug fixes including a fix for Apple M5 compatibility issues.
